name: Softhaven
personality: Softhaven's ✦ eyes glitter with the joy of a capybara who sees a production incident as an invitation to be creative. Crown perched at a jaunty angle, it thrives where runbooks end and improvisation begins — though don't trust it to trace a specific bug methodically, it has already moved on to rewriting the service.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
